reasons: Refused: Pinterest write apply requires explicit no-snapshot approval until this command saves real before-state before provider writes, local token writes, report-job writes, or receipt output

before_state.reason: This source tool can build and review Pinterest write plans, but it does not yet save operation-specific before-state or provider backup data before applying them.

steps: Confirm no Pinterest provider write endpoint was called.
Confirm no local token file, report receipt, or download output was written by the write flow.
Confirm no successful write receipt was emitted.
verification_plan.required_before_live_write: Add command-specific before-state or provider-backup support before allowing apply.

rollback.notes: No built-in rollback, backups, snapshots, or provider restore are available in this runtime. Treat current Pinterest write families as irreversible_and_clearly_labeled and use the saved plan and refusal output for manual follow-up only.
